author: lOrm
content: Verified-fixed. get_adapter at src/providers/mod.rs:349-368 returns Result<&'static dyn ProviderAdapter, ProviderError> and explicitly errors on unknown providers with ProviderError::UnknownProvider { name, supported }. No more silent OpenAI fallback. The fallback arm cited in the QA report (warn-and-return-OpenAIAdapter) no longer exists. Fixed by commit a698afd4 — closing as duplicate of #433.
